chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-596 of 2019 Ghulam Sarwar Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 1176/20 2. For hearing of CMA 1175/20 3. For hearing of CMA 2595/19 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 06.05.2025 Ms. Lareb Ahmed for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioner, on instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Head of Const. Benches Judge
